name: Pork Roast with Corn Bread & Oyster Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large saucepan, melt the butter; add the onion, celery, garlic, and fennel, and sauté for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender. Stir in the TABASCO sauce and salt. Add the cornbread stuffing mix, oysters, and liquid, tossing to mix well.
3. Make a deep slit in the back of each chop on the loin, and stuff each slit with the stuffing. Place the meat in a shallow roasting pan and cook for 30 to 35 minutes per pound or until a meat thermometer inserted into the meat registers 170°F.
4. Remove to a HEATED serving platter and allow meat to cool slightly before serving.
